tagline: Riverdale's trusted tax pro for over a decade — now with a brand and booking experience that finally matches the 5-star service.
brand_angle: Riverdale's trusted tax pro for over a decade — a polished, modern brand and booking site that finally matches the 5-star service.

services.title: Individual Tax Preparation
services.desc: Accurate, year-after-year personal return filing with maximized refunds and friendly, on-time service Riverdale clients have trusted for over a decade.

services.title: Business Tax & Bookkeeping
services.desc: Tax preparation and planning for small businesses and LLCs, keeping owners compliant and confident through every filing season.

services.title: Tax Planning & Advisory
services.desc: Proactive, year-round tax strategy that reduces liability and removes filing-day surprises for individuals and business owners.

self_exec.edge: Premium brand identity + modern conversion-focused website + AI automation (24/7 booking, intake, and follow-up).

data_policy: Verified data only. Aggregate rating (5.0) and review count (32) confirmed live on Birdeye; 5-star standing corroborated by BBB (A+) and Yelp. Founding year (2011) and owner (Honey McGhee-Landers) per GA Secretary of State filing. Office hours (Mon–Fri 9–6) per BBB/listing. No individual review text is fabricated or attributed; proof section presents the verified aggregate rating only.
